notes: Deduplicated before split; preprocessing and CV fit only on training data. Reference baseline only: the published ASD label is deterministically derived from questionnaire answers, so raw-questionnaire performance should not be interpreted as independent generalization evidence. CV-guided XGBoost params: {"colsample_bytree": 0.8, "learning_rate": 0.03, "max_depth": 4, "min_child_weight": 1, "n_estimators": 500, "reg_lambda": 1.0, "subsample": 0.9}.

Leakage-safe protocol: train-only graph fit plus unlabeled test embedding refresh. Reference baseline only: the published ASD label is deterministically derived from questionnaire answers, so raw-questionnaire performance should not be interpreted as independent generalization evidence. CV-guided XGBoost params: {"colsample_bytree": 0.7, "learning_rate": 0.02, "max_depth": 3, "min_child_weight": 2, "n_estimators": 700, "reg_lambda": 2.0, "subsample": 0.8}.

Leakage-safe protocol: deduplicate, split first, build graph on training set only, infer unlabeled test embeddings from the train graph. CV-guided XGBoost params: {"colsample_bytree": 0.7, "learning_rate": 0.05, "max_depth": 4, "min_child_weight": 4, "n_estimators": 250, "reg_lambda": 2.0, "subsample": 0.9}.
